tr.beam-deflection-formula-explained: Euler-Bernoulli kiriş teorisi, sehim limitleri ve servis kontrolleri.
tr.bearing-life-calculation-explained: ISO 281 L10 formülü, dinamik yük derecesi C ve eşdeger yük P.
tr.chip-breaker-logic: Tornalama ve diş açmada talaş kontrolü, TQ geometrileri ve kesme kuvveti.
tr.engineering-units-and-standards: SI ve İngiliz sistemleri, dönüşüm katsayıları ve ISO/DIN gibi yaygın standartlara giriş.
tr.fundamentals-of-statics: Newton yasaları, kuvvet vektörleri ve statik denge koşulları (ΣF=0, ΣM=0).
tr.how-to-calculate-bolt-torque: Ön yük, sürtünme katsayısı ve çap ile cıvata torku; VDI 2230 metodolojisi.
tr.introduction-to-machine-elements: Cıvata, rulman, dişli ve millerin temel tasarım kısıtları ve seçim mantığı.
tr.mechanics-of-materials-fundamentals: Eksenel yük, normal ve kayma gerilmesi, Hooke yasası.
tr.mohrs-circle-stress-analysis: Asal gerilmeler ve maksimum kayma gerilmesi; Mohr çemberi yöntemi.
tr.motor-power-calculation: Tork ve açısal hızdan motor gücü; verim ve birim dönüşümü.
tr.pressure-drop-calculation-guide: Darcy-Weisbach ile boru basınç düşümü ve Reynolds sayısı.
tr.thread-geometry-standards: ISO metrik, UN, Whitworth ve trapez profiller; tolerans sınıfları ve stress alanı.
tr.torsion-and-buckling-mechanics: Mil burulması ve Euler burkulma formülü ile stabilite.

de.beam-deflection-formula-explained: Understand the Euler-Bernoulli beam theory and how to calculate deflection for various loading conditions. Includes UDL, point load, and cantilever examples.
de.bearing-life-calculation-explained: Comprehensive guide to calculating bearing life using the ISO 281 L10 formula. Learn about dynamic load ratings, equivalent loads, and reliability factors.
de.chip-breaker-logic: An advanced machining module exploring chip control in threading. Learn about asymmetric point design, radial feed vs. modified flank feed, and cutting force reduction.
de.engineering-units-and-standards: A fundamental guide to units used in engineering, including SI and Imperial systems, conversion factors, and common standards like ISO and DIN.
de.fundamentals-of-statics: Learn the core principles of engineering statics, including Newton's laws, force vectors, and the conditions for static equilibrium (ΣF=0, ΣM=0).
de.how-to-calculate-bolt-torque: Learn how to calculate bolt torque for mechanical assembly using preload force, friction coefficient, and bolt diameter. Includes formula, examples, and VDI 2230 methodology.
de.introduction-to-machine-elements: An overview of common machine elements including fasteners, bearings, gears, and shafts. Learn why we use them and the basic design constraints.
de.mechanics-of-materials-fundamentals: An introductory course to Mechanics of Materials (Strength of Materials). Learn about axial loading, normal stress, shear stress, and Hooke's Law.
de.mohrs-circle-stress-analysis: Learn how to use Mohr's Circle to determine principal stresses and maximum shear stress in a material. Essential for advanced structural engineering and failure analysis.
de.motor-power-calculation: Learn how to calculate the power required for an electric motor based on torque and angular velocity. Includes efficiency and unit conversion guide.
de.pressure-drop-calculation-guide: Learn how to calculate pressure loss in fluid systems using the Darcy-Weisbach equation. Understand the roles of friction factor and Reynolds number.
de.thread-geometry-standards: A comprehensive guide to thread profiles, angles, and tolerances used in modern manufacturing. Covers ISO Metric, Unified National, Whitworth, and Trapezoidal standards.
de.torsion-and-buckling-mechanics: An analysis of rotational twisting (torsion) in shafts and sudden failure in columns (buckling) under compressive loads. Based on Euler's formula.
